section.heading: Authorization of appropriations

subsection.heading: In general
subsection.chapeau: There are authorized to be appropriated—

subparagraph.content: $50,000,000 shall be made available to the BJA Director to carry out this subchapter; and
$25,000,000 shall be made available to the COPS Director to carry out this subchapter; and

paragraph.chapeau: $100,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2019 through 2028, of which, for each fiscal year—

subparagraph.content: $67,000,000 shall be made available to the BJA Director to carry out this subchapter; and
$33,000,000 shall be made available to the COPS Director to carry out this subchapter.

content.p: Any funds appropriated for the Comprehensive School Safety Initiative of the National Institute of Justice in fiscal year 2018 shall instead be used for the purposes in subsection (a).

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 90–351, title I, § 2705, as added Pub. L. 115–141, div. S, title V, § 502(5), Mar. 23, 2018, 132 Stat. 1131.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 2705 of title I of Pub. L. 90–351, as added Pub. L. 106–386, div. B, title I, § 1108(b), Oct. 28, 2000, 114 Stat. 1502; amended Pub. L. 109–162, title XI, § 1169(a), Jan. 5, 2006, 119 Stat. 3122, was classified to section 3797e of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, prior to repeal by section 502(5) of title V of div. S of Pub. L. 115–141.
